group_1.textLeft: Woah, why's Yuu taking a nap on the—
...You killed her?

group_1.textRight: ...Yuu's Soul Gem is on the inner wall of her@stomach.
I knew that, which is why I was able to take@her out.

group_1.textLeft: ...I don't really get why you did that...
...but you saved me the trouble of having to fix@this Hotsure myself.
Well, Nagisa here is gonna head back to Kuroe@and her buddy.

group_1.textRight: ...Hey, you.
Where does that come from, anyway?
Did you just pull this whole thing about Hotsure@and the universe out of your ass or what?

group_1.textLeft: Rrgh...!@I'm not making it up, it's—

group_1.textRight: Don't bother explaining. I'll just sync up with you.

group_1.textLeft: Wh-what was that...?!
Did I just see...your memories...?

group_1.textRight: I literally just said I was gonna sync up with you.
But anyway... Yeah, alright. So those are your@memories.
A different universe from this one,@called the "Law of Cycles"...

group_1.textLeft: (I kinda wonder...)
(...if I leaked some risky info that I really@shouldn't have.)
(Did I screw up?)

group_1.textRight: As for what a "Hotsure" in this universe is...
Ultimately, they're caused by...
...you being an irregularity from another world,@right?
The fact that Yuu managed to stay alive in this@state...
...and the fact that Witches like the one you left@behind keep spawning everywhere—
It's all 'cause you're sticking around in this@universe...

group_1.textLeft: Why, you—!@You didn't have to say it out loud...
But even if Nagisa here left right now...
...it's too late for that to fix the Hotsure problem.
And, well... Sure, there are people who ended up@in a bad spot because of me...
...but there's gotta be some things that have@improved because of me, too.
I feel like life's an endless cycle of stuff like that.

group_1.textRight: ...I'm with you there.
On that note— lemme ask you something.
When you talk about Hotsure being "the root of@all evil"...
...what point of view are you seeing "evil" from?
The level of malice? The number of victims?@Something like the total damage overall?

group_1.textLeft: If you took that info straight out of my head,@you should know that already.
The "root of all evil" bit...
...is just what I've been calling it...

group_1.textRight: Your definition's basically...
"Something that makes the Law of Cycles sad."
Speaking of, I'm surprised that this entire@"Law of Cycles" system...
...came from a single Magical Girl.
Anyway, you busted out of there, so why@do you give a shit about stuff like that?

group_1.textLeft: I know I've been causing trouble for the@Law of Cycles...
...but I'm not so ungrateful that I want it@to be sad.

group_1.textRight: Then you probably feel like the "Law of Cycles"@thinks that, I dunno...
"There's no such thing as a future that's@inherently destined to be awful."
Or something along those lines, anyway.

group_1.textLeft: Nagisa here...
...would never presume something so naive!
I'm ab-so-lutely gonna meddle with the worst@possible future!

group_1.textRight: ...Even if we know everything about each other...
...whether we understand each other or not is@a different story, huh?

group_1.textLeft: Are you seriously just figuring that out now?
Is this your first year as a human or something?
I still can't believe that you...
You...
Why did you kill Yuu?!
Sure, she was hollow and all...
...but she could've carried that with her into@tomorrow...
It would've been one thing if I did this,@but why would you...?!

group_1.textRight: You saw my heart, too, yeah?
Painting Yuu over with my own shameful,@ugly hopes...
...would've been the most revolting thing@I could've done.

group_1.textLeft: I can't stand people like you...
...who won't compromise!

group_1.textRight: Heheh... [chara:390200:lipSynch_0][wait:1.0][chara:390200:lipSynch_1]That so, huh?
I better head out.

group_1.textLeft: Where are you going...?

group_1.textRight: Shouldn't you know that?
I'm...gonna live for someone else's sake.
I wanna be the kind of Magical Girl who can clear@away other people's anger and regrets.
I hadn't fully understood the ins and outs of my@own abilities...
...but I was able to figure stuff out with@the information I got from Kyubey.
Most of what I experience in my dreams...
...comes from girls who have Magical Girl qualities@in some way.
Nagisa.
The way your mother treated you was one of the@things I went through in my dreams.
Seems your emotions indirectly caused that.

group_1.textLeft: ...And what about it?!
You want me to say "wow, thanks" or something?!

group_1.textRight: I didn't go out of my way to decide to become@a Magical Girl.
Like Kuroe-san was telling me about earlier,@though...
...I just wanna live for the kind and the weak.
I don't need to be an individual anymore.
I'll keep listenin' to the voiceless and become a@spokesperson for the unheard.
I'm gonna be a Magical Girl who saves people@in a new way...
...just like you were afraid of.
That's the kinda Magical Girl I'm choosin' to be.

group_1.textLeft: It doesn't matter who you avenge! It's too little@too late!
Nagisa here will never forgive you!

group_1.textRight: Yeah, I don't expect anyone to.
But I'm a Magical Girl now.
If I don't try to do everything in my power to try@to save someone...
...and I just roll over and give up while@their heart's getting stomped on...
...don't you think that's pretty much the same@as abandoning them?

group_1.textLeft: I'm telling you, that's not "saving" anybody!
What the heck was the point...
...of wishing to share other people's hope and@happiness?!
You only need curses and despair to do that!

group_1.textRight: ...[wait:0.8][chara:390200:cheek_0][chara:390200:motion_300][chara:390200:lipSynch_1]Y'know what? You might have a point.
But I bet that Yuu would keep makin' these@mistakes...
...trying to save every last person she could...
I know she'd definitely try...
...to save as many of herself as possible,@for her own sake.
Isn't that right? Yuu...

group_1.textCenter: Woah! She fused with her Doppel...?!

group_1.narration: "Time's not gonna move for me anymore.@I'll be here in the world of yesterday,@watching you shoot for tomorrow."
"So long,@Magical Girl aiming for the future beyond The End."

group_1.textCenter: The root of all evil is gonna lead to the worst@possible future!
But a Hotsure's just a Hotsure! It's not inherently@"good" or "bad"!
It's something you can decide for yourself when@the time comes!
But I'm definitely gonna call the cops on you...
...so you better enjoy your life on the run@to the fullest!
And I'm NOT saying this because I'm a sore loser,@you hear me?! You stupid idiot!
